summary: Iteration 40: Testing Client Tags Feature and PSP Net Settlement. Backend: 12/13 tests PASSED (1 skipped - treasury transfer needs same-currency accounts with balance). Frontend: All Client Tags UI components verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/client-tags returns list of tags with tag_id, name, color
Backend: POST /api/client-tags creates new tag successfully
Backend: POST /api/client-tags rejects duplicate tag names (400)
Backend: DELETE /api/client-tags/{tag_id} deletes tag successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/client-tags/{tag_id} returns 404 for nonexistent tag
Backend: GET /api/transactions?client_tag=VIP accepts tag filter parameter
Backend: Transaction tag filter returns matching transactions
Backend: GET /api/psp returns list of PSPs
Backend: PSP pending_settlement amounts are never negative
Backend: POST /api/psp/{psp_id}/net-settle endpoint exists and works
Backend: GET /api/psp/{psp_id}/settlements returns settlement history
Backend: GET /api/treasury returns treasury accounts
Frontend: Tag filter dropdown visible on Transaction Summary page
Frontend: Manage Tags button opens dialog with existing tags
Frontend: Manage Tags dialog shows 5 predefined tags (CLT, Corporate, High Risk, Premium, VIP)
Frontend: Manage Tags dialog has new tag input, color picker, and create button
Frontend: Each tag has delete button in Manage Tags dialog
Frontend: Tags column visible in transaction table
Frontend: Create Transaction form has CLIENT TAGS section with + Add tag dropdown
Frontend: New Transaction Request form has CLIENT TAGS section
Frontend: PSP page shows 3 PSPs (uni, network, TEST PSP)
Frontend: PSP details dialog shows Net Pending amount
Frontend: PSP details has Deposits, Withdrawals, Reserve Fund, Settlement History tabs
Frontend: Treasury page shows 6 accounts with balances
Frontend: Inter-Treasury Transfer form has TRANSFER DATE field with date picker
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 1684-1720: Client Tags CRUD endpoints correctly implemented with tag_id, name, color fields
server.py lines 6540-6582: Transaction list correctly accepts client_tag filter parameter and queries client_tags array field
server.py lines 7091-7139: Transaction create correctly accepts client_tags as comma-separated Form parameter
server.py lines 4212-4325: Net Settlement endpoint correctly calculates deposits - withdrawals - deductions
Transactions.js lines 224-229: Client tags state management correctly implemented
Transactions.js lines 365-389: Tag CRUD functions (fetchClientTags, handleCreateTag, handleDeleteTag) work correctly
Transactions.js lines 1860-1875: Tag filter dropdown and Manage Tags button properly placed in filter bar
Transactions.js lines 2002-2008: Tags column correctly renders tag badges with colors
Transactions.js lines 1686-1711: Create Transaction form has CLIENT TAGS selector with + Add tag dropdown
Transactions.js lines 2503-2548: Manage Tags dialog correctly shows all tags with delete buttons
TransactionRequests.js lines 490-491: Client tags state (clientTags, formTags) correctly initialized
TransactionRequests.js lines 963-985: New Request form has CLIENT TAGS section with tag badges and add dropdown
PSPs.js lines 600-635: handleNetSettle function correctly calls POST /api/psp/{psp_id}/net-settle
PSPs.js lines 1130-1160: Net Pending display correctly calculates deposits - withdrawals - deductions
Treasury.js lines 1475-1485: Transfer Date field correctly implemented with data-testid='transfer-date'
seed_data_creation: Test tags created and deleted during testing (TEST_Tag_*, TEST_Dup_*, TEST_Del_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client Tags feature fully implemented and tested: (1) Backend CRUD endpoints work correctly at /api/client-tags. (2) Transaction filtering by client_tag works. (3) Transaction creation accepts client_tags parameter. (4) Frontend has tag filter dropdown, Manage Tags dialog, and tag selectors in both Create Transaction and New Request forms. (5) Tags column displays in transaction table. (6) PSP Net Settlement endpoint works at POST /api/psp/{psp_id}/net-settle. (7) Inter-Treasury Transfer has Transfer Date field. All PSPs currently show $0 pending (all settled).
